queries.question: Show me extra charges as % of the total amount
queries.sql: Select Fee_Amount / Amount * 100 as  Percentage from Transactions
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?calc WHERE {
  ?transactions a :Transactions .
  ?transactions p:Fee_Amount ?fee_amount_n .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount_n .
  BIND(((xsd:double(?fee_amount_n) / xsd:double(?amount_n)) * 100) AS ?calc)
}

queries.question: Show me extra charges as % of the total amount
queries.sql: Select Commission_Percentage / Amount * 100 as  Percentage from Transactions
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>

queries.question: Show me extra charges as % of the total amount
queries.sql: Select Fee_Amount, Commission_Percentage / Amount * 100 as  Percentage from Transactions
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fee_amount ?calc WHERE {
  ?transactions a :Transactions .
  ?transactions p:Fee_Amount ?fee_amount .
  ?transactions p:Commission_Percentage ?commission_percentage_n .
  ?transactions p:Amount ?amount_n .
  BIND(((xsd:double(?commission_percentage_n) / xsd:double(?amount_n)) * 100) AS ?calc)
}

queries.question: Show me the most recent transaction amount and commission percentage.
queries.sql: Select Commission_Percentage from Transactions order by Date DESC Limit 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?commission_percentage WHERE {
  ?transactions a :Transactions .
  ?transactions p:Commission_Percentage ?commission_percentage .
  ?transactions p:Date ?date_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Show me the most recent transaction amount along with fee amount and commission percentage.
queries.sql: Select Fee_Amount, Commission_Percentage from Transactions order by Date DESC Limit 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fee_amount ?commission_percentage WHERE {
  ?transactions a :Transactions .
  ?transactions p:Fee_Amount ?fee_amount .
  ?transactions p:Commission_Percentage ?commission_percentage .
  ?transactions p:Date ?date_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date_o)
LIMIT 1
